title: Peanut Gimbap Chinese Snack
description: A Chinese-inspired snack version of the Korean classic, Gimbap, with a crunchy peanut twist.
instructions: Cook the rice according to package instructions.
In a pan, heat the sesame oil and sauté the crunchy vegetables until tender.
In a small bowl, whisk together soy sauce, sugar, and salt. Brush the mixture on the gimbap wraps.
Lay a gimbap wrap flat and spread a thin layer of cooked rice onto it.
Add a few pieces of the sautéed vegetables and a sprinkle of peanut on top of the rice.
Add another layer of cooked rice on top of the filling.
Roll the gimbap into a tight cylinder and slice into individual pieces.
